purpose: Frozen pre-deploy baseline for verifying the Mythos harness slices (A behavioral layer, B JSON-repair + structured tool-error hints, C uniform tool-use discipline). Re-run scripts/verify-harness-failure-rate.mjs after several days of post-deploy traffic and compare AFTER columns against this BEFORE snapshot.
deploy_boundary_note: slice-C (uniform tool discipline, PR #427) live; slices A (#424) and B (#425) deployed earlier the same session. All baseline events predate this boundary.

primary_exec_refusal.source: data/exec-audit.jsonl (append-only, one row per repo-exec attempt)

baseline.loop_signatures_note: LoopGuard cross-session learned-loop store is empty — recurring stuck-loops are not happening; corroborates deferring swarm-rescue.

success_criteria.min_after_sample: Do not judge until AFTER has >= ~100 repo-exec attempts (else noise).
success_criteria.primary_win: AFTER model_fixable_rate_pct materially below 28.2% (target: relative drop >= 30%, i.e. < ~20%).
success_criteria.swarm_rescue_check: If AFTER stuck_or_loop_rate stays ~1% or lower, the decision to defer swarm-rescue stands.
